Emily Johnson
Cleveland, OH

Summary
Dedicated customer service representative with over 5 years of experience in retail and hospitality. Proven ability to manage multiple tasks in fast-paced environments and provide exceptional service to clients. Seeking to leverage strong communication skills and a commitment to safety in a new role.

Experience
Customer Service Representative  
Big City Retail, Cleveland, OH  
January 2021 - Present  
- Provided excellent customer service in a busy retail environment, assisting with product inquiries and transactions.  
- Managed inventory and ensured store cleanliness, contributing to an inviting shopping experience.  
- Trained new employees on customer service protocols and store policies.

Barista  
Coffee Haven, Cleveland, OH  
June 2019 - December 2020  
- Prepared and served coffee and tea beverages to customers, ensuring high-quality standards.  
- Maintained a clean and organized work area, adhering to health and safety regulations.  
- Developed strong relationships with regular customers, enhancing loyalty and repeat business.

Delivery Associate  
Quick Delivery Services, Cleveland, OH  
March 2018 - May 2019  
- Responsible for delivering packages across the city, ensuring timely and accurate deliveries.  
- Managed delivery schedules and communicated with customers regarding their shipments.  
- Maintained vehicle cleanliness and performed basic maintenance checks.

Certifications
- Food Handler Certification, Ohio  
- CPR and First Aid Certified
